mpeg_o.transition_list
======================

.. py:module:: mpeg_o.transition_list

.. autoapi-nested-parse::

   ``TransitionList`` — targeted SRM/MRM transition collection.



Classes
-------

.. autoapisummary::

   mpeg_o.transition_list.Transition
   mpeg_o.transition_list.TransitionList


Module Contents
---------------

.. py:class:: Transition

   One SRM/MRM transition.

   :param precursor_mz: Precursor m/z.
   :type precursor_mz: float
   :param product_mz: Product m/z.
   :type product_mz: float
   :param collision_energy: Collision energy (eV).
   :type collision_energy: float, default 0.0
   :param retention_time_window: Optional retention-time acceptance window.
   :type retention_time_window: ValueRange or None, default None

   .. rubric:: Notes

   API status: Stable.

   Cross-language equivalents
   --------------------------
   Objective-C: ``MPGOTransition`` · Java:
   ``com.dtwthalion.mpgo.TransitionList.Transition``.


   .. py:attribute:: precursor_mz
      :type:  float


   .. py:attribute:: product_mz
      :type:  float


   .. py:attribute:: collision_energy
      :type:  float
      :value: 0.0



   .. py:attribute:: retention_time_window
      :type:  mpeg_o.value_range.ValueRange | None
      :value: None



.. py:class:: TransitionList

   An ordered collection of SRM/MRM transitions.

   :param transitions: Ordered transitions.
   :type transitions: tuple[Transition, ...], default ()

   .. rubric:: Notes

   API status: Stable.

   Cross-language equivalents
   --------------------------
   Objective-C: ``MPGOTransitionList`` · Java:
   ``com.dtwthalion.mpgo.TransitionList``.


   .. py:attribute:: transitions
      :type:  tuple[Transition, Ellipsis]
      :value: ()



   .. py:method:: __len__() -> int


   .. py:method:: count() -> int

      Return the number of transitions.



   .. py:method:: transition_at_index(index: int) -> Transition

      Return the transition at ``index``.
